subject: Stacker memory problems
body:
We have been using Stacker to move and compress MRC stack to tiff. The data 
comes from EPU. Stacker runs on our Gatan/K2 computer which has 32 GB of 
RAM. As we pushed acquisition speed up to 200 images per hour we started 
getting many crashes in EPU. What we found eventually was that Stacker was 
filling the RAM of the K2 computer doing the conversion to tiff. Then some 
step of processing the frames from the K2 would fail causing EPU to crash. 
It appears Stacker allocates more memory than needed then doesn't release 
it. We run with one file processed in parellel to minimze the needed 
memory. Using stacker to ONLY move uses no memory and eveything is fine. 
Adding more RAM to the K2 computer is an obvious solution (GATAN objects) 
but it is not clear that Stacker wouldn't just grab more and more memory 
until failure. WE are using unnormalized packed files from EPU which I 
believe are 8 bit.

Thanks,

Dennis
